creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Hello!
> i installed FreeBSD 6.1 on my server.
> But there is no drivers for my ethernet interfaces!!!
> My server motherboard
> http://www.intel.com/design/servers/boards/s5000PAL/index.htm
> So i can't find drivers for ethernet adapters integrated in this model.
> Guys, i realy want to use FreeBSD!!!! HELP!!!!!!!!
>> How-To-Repeat:
> 

Hello Vladimir,

Please defer to http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-net
and ask your question there, there are people who are writing the
device drivers etc and might point you to the information/software
you want.

This however is not a problem but a User-request (do not feel offended
please).

I hope someone can help you on the -net list.

Thanks for taking the time to report this though!

Best regards,
Remko

-- 
Kind regards,

      Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
      FreeBSD                    ** remko@FreeBSD.org

      /* Quis custodiet ipsos custodes */
